name: Low-Fat Lobster Canapes
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread toast rounds with tartar sauce; set aside.
2. In a nonstick skillet over high heat, sauté mushrooms and garlic in water and white wine until the liquid has evaporated. Remove from heat and let cool for 15 minutes.
3. Transfer the mushroom mixture to a medium-sized bowl. Mix in the cooked lobster.
4. Sprinkle the mixture equally over the tartar sauce on each toast round and dust with paprika.
5. Chill in the refrigerator for one hour.
6. Fifteen minutes before chilling is complete, combine horseradish, Parmesan cheese, and mayonnaise in a bowl and mix well.
7. Press the mixture through a pastry bag to create a border around each toast round.
8. Place a sprig of watercress in the center of each canape.
Makes 12 servings.
Calories 172 Fat 0.6 g Fiber 0.6 g.
